title: China Moves the Price of Oil, Even When It Buys Less
summary_full: China is the world’s largest purchaser of oil. But three months after the war with Iran began, it cut its imports, cushioning the global market.
summary_public: China is the world’s largest purchaser of oil. But three months after the war with Iran began, it cut its imports, cushioning the global market.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: war with Iran began... cushioning the global market
